suggestions.title: Align infra configurability with runtime behavior for TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE
suggestions.recommendation: Do not constrain trapiAuthScope to a single allowed value if runtime supports configurable scopes.
suggestions.resolution: Removed the single-value @allowed constraint and kept a secure default value.

suggestions.title: Make template test resilient to ARM resource ordering
suggestions.recommendation: Find the Function App resource by type instead of relying on a fixed list index.
suggestions.resolution: Updated test to select Microsoft.Web/sites resource via type lookup.

suggestions.title: Add deployed Key Vault reference resolution validation
suggestions.recommendation: Add a post-deployment integration check that verifies TRAPI_ENDPOINT Key Vault reference resolves in Azure.
suggestions.notes: Repository test suite is unit-test only and has no Azure integration environment in this task scope.

suggestions.title: Validate non-empty scope at deployment input
suggestions.recommendation: Add minimum length validation for trapiAuthScope to prevent empty deployments.
suggestions.resolution: Added @minLength(1) to trapiAuthScope parameter and regenerated infra/modules/functionapp.json.

suggestions.title: Harden runtime scope resolution for empty env values
suggestions.recommendation: Treat blank TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE as unset and fallback to default scope.
suggestions.resolution: Updated _get_bearer_token() to use stripped env value with fallback to DEFAULT_TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE.

suggestions.title: Add regression test for empty scope env var
suggestions.recommendation: Add unit test ensuring empty/whitespace TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE falls back safely.

suggestions.title: Improve missing-resource assertion clarity in infra template test
suggestions.recommendation: Add explicit assertion message if Function App resource is missing.
suggestions.resolution: Test now asserts presence of Microsoft.Web/sites with a clear failure message before dereferencing.
